title: tephrosia cephalantha var. cephalantha
intro: Tephrosia cephalantha var. cephalantha, also known as the 'Yellow Pea', is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia cephalantha var. cephalantha include relief from fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to treat various ailments, although caution and professional guidance are recommended due to its potential toxicity.
